project_metadata.project_name: AI-Powered Resume Detection & Parsing System for Engineering Recruitment

sensors_for_motor_control: Current Sensors (Shunt, Hall Effect, Rogowski Coil, CT)

certifications: NABCEP (North American Board Certified Energy Practitioner)

classical_control: Time Response (Rise Time, Settling Time, Overshoot, Steady-State Error)
Frequency Response (Bode Plot, Nyquist Plot, Nichols Chart)
Stability Analysis (Routh-Hurwitz, Root Locus, Gain Margin, Phase Margin)
PID Controllers (P, I, D, PI, PD, PID, Cascade, Feedforward)
control_software: MATLAB/Simulink (Control System Toolbox, System Identification Toolbox)
PLC Programming (Ladder Logic, Structured Text, Function Block)
real_time_control_hardware: PLC (Programmable Logic Controllers - Siemens, Allen-Bradley, Mitsubishi)
DCS (Distributed Control Systems - Emerson DeltaV, Honeywell Experion)

robot_software_libraries.name: Bullet
robot_software_libraries.purpose: Physics Simulation (Collision Detection, Rigid Body Dynamics)

extractors.pdf: PyMuPDF + pdfplumber (fallback: Tesseract OCR with eng+eng_technical)
extractors.image: Tesseract 5.3.3 (LSTM mode) + custom engineering symbol training
extractors.scanned_pdf: OCRmyPDF + Tesseract + custom dictionary (GD&T, electrical symbols, equations)

checks: certification_lookup (verify against PE, CSWP, Altium, etc.)

example_resume_entries.summary: PhD in Thermal Sciences with 12+ years experience in aerospace thermal management. Expert in ANSYS Fluent and CATIA. Led teams of 8-12 engineers.
example_resume_entries.education: PhD Mechanical Engineering (Stanford), MS (MIT), BS (UC Berkeley)

example_resume_entries.summary: Senior Embedded Engineer with 8 years experience in automotive electronics. Expert in STM32, CAN bus, and Altium Designer. Developed ASIL-B compliant systems.
example_resume_entries.education: MSEE Power Electronics (UT Austin), BSEE (Texas A&M)

example_resume_entries.summary: Robotics software engineer with 6 years experience in ROS, perception, and control. Built autonomous mobile robots for warehouse logistics.
example_resume_entries.education: MS Robotics (CMU), BS Mechanical Engineering (IIT Bombay)
